name: Cranapana Bread (Lower Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, oil, milk, egg beaters, and mashed bananas. Mix well.
3. Stir in the flour mixture.
4. Fold in the cranberries, apple, walnuts, and raisins.
5. Spoon the batter into a greased 9x5-inch loaf pan.
6. Bake at 350°F. for 60 minutes.
7. Optional topping: Mix together confectioners sugar and skim milk to make a glaze; spread over cooled loaf.
